leadText: The Carrot Seeds (Japanese: にんじんのタネ Carrot Seeds) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Carrot Seeds allow the player to acquire the Iceroot Carrot in Snowslide Slope 's crop plot or the Shaderoot Carrot in the Old Cemetery 's crop plot to summon either Glastrier or Spectrier , respectively.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Seeds to plant in a field. The kind of carrot you'll get is determined by which field you plant the seeds in.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Carrot Seeds allow the player to acquire the Iceroot Carrot in Snowslide Slope 's crop plot or the Shaderoot Carrot in the Old Cemetery 's crop plot to summon either Glastrier or Spectrier , respectively. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Seeds to plant in a field. The kind of carrot you'll get is determined by which field you plant the seeds in. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh CT Freezington (from an old man near the crop plots for eight pieces of Dynite Ore )
